item.title: It's yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
shrek wants to watch. greetings online friends
please don't hit spiders, gang.. they are our friends
oh yeah
this is what i do, i sit on you https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4us7Nkv_YwU
ciabatta is pretty close to my age. weird
i guess
stylin' AND profilin'
this game is hot hot hot
i don't like this
perfection
mmm hmm
i can't believe they are still going
are you taking notes, ladies?
so rude
hero
ok
accurate
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Music from the '90s Airwaves
item.description:
Natalie Imbruglia - Torn A handy dandy Spotify for this playlist - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6Y5ZAYafXcESwM2r8v3x1a?si=45a4d7aad50f424c
Rusted Root - Send Me On My Way
TLC - What About Your Friends
4 Non Blondes - What's Up?
No Doubt (Gwen Stefani) - Just a Girl
Beastie Boys - Intergalactic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qORYO0atB6g
Inner Circle - Bad Boys Originally released in 1987 to poor sales and zero airplay. Then it became engrained into pop culture when it was selected as the theme song to the '89 reality series "COPS" (one of the producers was unexpectedly a fan of the group) After this as well as the unexpected success of one of their later songs (Sweat - A La La La La Long), they re-released it in '93 as a single and it became a huge hit on the charts. Especially in Europe.
The Cranberries - Linger (making their US television debut on Conan)
Aaliyah - Are You That Somebody
The Offspring - Self Esteem
Alanis Morrissette - Hand in My Pocket
Barenaked Ladies - One Week
Brandy and Monica - The Boy is Mine
Vengaboys - We Like to Party
Scatman John - (Ski-ba-bop-ba-dop-bop)
Gloria Estefan - Turn the Beat Around
Shania Twain - Any Man of Mine A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0xn43L2WypeZoWydTrv0Fr Wayback in 1973 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2rlT8Yh Wayback in 1983 - https://imgur.com/gallery/T1CGaYx Wayback in 1988 - https://imgur.com/gallery/qBqeSu1 Wayback in 1993 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4 Wayback in 1998 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2qki0gA
Whitney Houston - I Will Always Love You
Soul Asylum - Runaway Train
Created by "Pacific Data Images", and improved upon for the video... effects originally used only for motion pictures like WILLOW and TERMINATOR 2: JUDGMENT DAY EDIT: An article about the making of it - https://www.cartoonbrew.com/vfx/oral-history-morphing-michael-jacksons-black-white-144015.html
Lenny Kravitz - Are You Gonna Go My Way?
Seal - Kiss From a Rose
The Dixie Chicks - Wide Open Spaces
Aerosmith - I Don't Wanna Miss a Thing
Tag Team - Whoomp! (There It Is)
10,000 Maniacs - Candy Everybody Wants
Beastie Boys - Sabotage
2 Unlimited - No Limit
Céline Dion - My Heart Will Go On
Tupac - Changes Originally recorded in 1992, it was remixed and released posthumously after Shakur's murder in 1996
Sheryl Crow - Strong Enough
Outkast - Rosa Parks
Smashing Pumpkins - Tonight, Tonight
Aqua - Lollipop (Candyman)
Luniz - I Got 5 on It
Alanais Morissette - Thank U
Brandy - I Wanna Be Down
Martin Page - In the House of Stone & Light
Ol' Dirty Bastard (of the Wu-Tang Clan) - Shimmy Shimmy Ya
Tina Turner - GoldenEye
U2 - Hold Me, Thrill Me, Kiss Me, Kill Me
Del Amitri - Roll to Me
Hootie and the Blowfish - Hold My Hand
TLC - Creep
Shakira - Ciega, Sordomuda
Shania Twain - The Woman in Me (Needs the Man in You)
Dionne Farris - I Know
Bon Jovi - This Ain't a Love Song
Oasis - All Around the World
Vanessa Williams - Colors of the Wind
AC/DC - Hard as a Rock
Third Eye Blind - How's it Going to Be?
4 THE CAUSE - Stand By Me
The Pretenders - I'll Stand By You
Smashing Pumpkins - Ava Adore
Usher - My Way
Natalie Merchant - Carnival
Mariah Carey - Fantasy
Robbie Williams - Millennium
Whitney Houston and Mariah Carey - When You Believe https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LKaXY4IdZ40
Brandy - Baby
Adina Howard - Freak Like Me
Diana King - Shy Guy
INOJ - Time After Time
Destiny's Child - No, No, No
Aqua - Turn Back Time
Iron Maiden - Man on the Edge
Ricky Martin - La Copa de la Vida
Metallica - Whiskey in the Jar
LeAnn Rimes - Looking Through Your Eyes
The Outhere Brothers - Boom Boom Boom
Faith Hill - This Kiss
The Verve - Bitter Sweet Symphony
Weird Al Yankovic - Germs
The Rembrandts - I'll Be There For You (the Theme Song for F*R*I*E*N*D*S)

item.title: Oh boy, do I remember when!
item.description:
Yup. And the suspenders!
I beat Simon!
But never beat this....
Ah, Saturday morning cartoons!
My fave as a kid
True story, the old 5 and Dime.
Scary bitch
How many do you recognize??
I had a belt like that headband
My ma made these
I had this issue!
Fave tv show about a German shepherd. Don't know who that guy is.
Had one.
Sister had one
Had the Kodak instamatic camera!
I swear my mother made all of these.
Breakfast!
Kool-aid in a can
Best bubbles ever
POGO!!
schlemiel, schlimazel....
Hubba-hubba
#Truth *FP edit: I'm really happy (most) everyone enjoyed this post. Now I can get all these off my phone! Never die imgur!
item.dc:creator: EverythingYourMotherWarnedYouAbout

item.title: Normal Load - Every Time
item.description: Laundry all day. Seemingly endlessly. Three kids. It’s a deluge. Who even has time to separate their clothes? What are all these extra modes for? Same with a microwave- just nuke it for a few minutes, add 30 seconds til it’s good to go. IATA? #confession_bear

item.title: Screaming into the void
item.description: My recent ex slut shamed me for my (lower than his!) body count and now this happens. This is the 5th time I’ve been sexually assaulted. I don’t know how to survive this, I feel disgusting and horrendous. I feel so worthless. Any advice would be appreciated

item.title: NeSpoon is a Polish artist, born in Warsaw, who mixes the delicacy of lace with the roughness and freedom of urban art
item.dc:creator: neoswhiterabbitt

item.title: Heroic rat
item.description: https://globalnews.ca/news/7358507/hero-rat-gold-medal-landmines/ This is a Gambian pouch rat. They are used in not only finding landmines, but also in detecting tuberculosis. With landmines, they have proven safer and more effective than bomb sniffing dogs. Partly because they are too light to set off the landmines, but also because they are able to fit into more spaces and are not as prone to giving false positives in an over eager effort to please their handlers like dogs sometimes are. And with the tuberculosis, they are able to accurately test samples (by scent) to detect tuberculosis many times faster than a human using traditional lab equipment. For these reasons they are also known as "hero rats".
item.dc:creator: Othagovna

item.title: Rita
item.description: Rita Levi-Montalcini was kicked out of the University of Turin, simply because she was Jewish. She continued learning on her terms by building a laboratory in her bedroom and got to work studying motor neurons in chick embryos. She worked with an assistant laying the groundwork for the modern concept of nerve cell death, and eventually accepted an invitation from Viktor Hamburger at Washington University in St. Louis, Missouri. Her work provided scientists with a way to study disorders of neural degeneration. Think: Alzheimer’s, dementia, multiple sclerosis, schizophrenia, and autism–and earned her a Nobel Prize in Physiology and Medicine. She eventually returned to Italy and received one of the nation’s highest honors when she became a senator for life. She shared, “If I had not been discriminated against or had not suffered persecution, I would never have received the Nobel Prize.” #JewishHeritageMonth
item.dc:creator: darpaslittleprincess

item.title: Nostalgia? In 1947, a Runaway 10-Year Old Went to 16 movies, Bought 15 Comic Books, 6 Games, 150 Candy Bars & Hot Dogs for $20 ... in 7 Days ...
item.description: $20 Dollars ... How long would that sustain you as a runaway now? 30-minutes?? https://sf.gazetteer.co/the-true-story-behind-the-kid-who-went-1940s-viral-for-his-week-at-the-cinemas-in-san-francisco
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
